timerDone.calibratedBody: This is about when {{label}} usually wraps. Log it when you're done.
timerDone.uncalibratedBody: This was your estimate for {{label}}. Log it whenever you wrap.

startBy.title: Start by {{time}}
startBy.body: Start {{label}} now and you'll finish by {{deadline}}.

guard.title: Still on {{label}}?
guard.body: You've been at it about {{minutes}} minutes. No pressure, just a nudge.

review.title: Your honest week is ready
review.body: Your week in honest numbers, whenever you've got a minute.

routine.body: Start {{name}} now to finish on time.
